places.name: Half-Century-Old Soup
places.description: At a Bangkok bistro, one pot of beef stew has been cooking non-stop for more than 45 years.

places.name: Amulet Market
places.description: Bangkok's men with dangerous jobs come here in search of protective talismans.

places.name: Papaya Studio
places.description: Vintage furniture and art share space with all manner of collectibles at this quirky shop in Bangkok.

places.name: Siriraj Medical Museum
places.description: A treasure trove of pathological, forensic, parasitological, and anatomical specimens.

places.name: Wat Mahathat (Temple of the Great Relic)
places.description: The headquarters of the Mahanikai school of Buddhism, Thailand's largest monastic order.

places.name: Wat Arun
places.description: This dazzling Buddhist temple was constructed from over one million ceramic tiles salvaged from a British shipwreck.

places.name: Cabbages & Condoms
places.description: A condom-covered Thai restaurant that is more concerned with birth control than food.

places.name: Haoma
places.description: An on-site urban farm and fish pond supply some of the produce for this upscale restaurant.
